hero.headline: ETEYA
hero.subheadline: Less manual work. More growth. That's what we deliver.

items.name: Telestore
items.description: Automated order management, customer communication, and inventory flows for one of Sweden's leading resellers of refurbished phones.

items.name: AICaller
items.description: AI receptionist taking orders 24/7 for restaurants — integrated with POS systems and delivery platforms.

items.name: ReturnAI
items.description: Intelligent returns management platform that automates decisions, reduces costs, and improves the customer experience.

items.name: Partner Portal
items.description: Custom order portal for B2B partners with real-time inventory, dynamic pricing, and automated order flows.

items.title: AI Agents
items.description: Autonomous agents that handle workflows, communication, and decisions — around the clock. No human input required at every step.
items.detail: From customer service to internal automation. We build agents that actually work in production.

items.title: Process Automation
items.description: We identify and automate the manual processes that drain your time. Integrations, triggers, and flows that run without your hand.
items.detail: Make, n8n, custom webhooks — whatever it takes to connect your systems and eliminate manual work.

items.title: Custom Builds
items.description: Need something that doesn't exist yet? We build it. AI-powered software tailored to your problem, your industry, your requirements.
items.detail: Full-stack development with AI at the core. From idea to deployed product in weeks, not months.

items.question: How long does it take to implement an AI solution?
items.answer: Most projects go live within 2–6 weeks. We start with a brief discovery phase to understand your needs and then build iteratively. You will see progress after the first week.

items.question: Do we need technical expertise in-house?
items.answer: No. We handle the entire technical implementation. All we need from you is knowledge about your business and access to the systems that need to be integrated.

items.question: What does an AI agent or automation cost?
items.answer: Every project is unique and pricing depends on complexity and scope. We always provide a fixed quote after the discovery phase so you know exactly what it costs before we start.

items.question: How do you handle our data and GDPR?
items.answer: We are fully GDPR compliant. All data is processed within the EU, we sign DPAs when needed and build with privacy by design. Your data is never used to train AI models.

items.question: What tools and platforms do you work with?
items.answer: We are tool-agnostic and choose what fits best. Common tools include OpenAI, Anthropic, Make, n8n and custom builds with Python, TypeScript and modern AI frameworks.

items.question: How do we know if AI is right for our business?
items.answer: If you have repetitive processes, handle large volumes of data or want to scale without hiring, there is likely an AI solution that saves you time and money. Book a free call and we will do a quick assessment.

items.question: Do you offer support after delivery?
items.answer: Yes. Every project includes documentation and handover. We also offer ongoing support, optimization and further development so the solution grows with your business.

transparency.hourlyRate: Hourly cost: 350 SEK/h — based on SCB salary statistics 2024, cross-validated against actual client data (269–370 SEK/h)
transparency.automationRates: Automation rates: based on McKinsey (2023) and verified against a Swedish e-commerce company with 56 active automations
transparency.yearOneFactor: Year 1 factor: 65% of full savings (includes implementation and ramp-up, verified against actual client data)
transparency.range: Range (±15%) reflects variation between companies. All assumptions are conservative — the calculator underestimates rather than overestimates
transparency.disclaimer: Estimates based on SCB, McKinsey and verified client data. Actual savings depend on your process maturity, system landscape and implementation.

meta.title: AI Savings — How We Calculate Your ROI | Eteya
meta.description: Transparent methodology behind Eteya's ROI calculator. Based on SCB, McKinsey and verified client data from a Swedish e-commerce company.

hero.title: How we calculate your AI savings
hero.subtitle: Transparent methodology based on academic sources and verified client data

sections.approachBody: Most ROI calculators on the market rely solely on generic industry reports and theoretical assumptions. The problem? Every company is unique — processes, team sizes, tools, and system landscapes differ dramatically. Generic numbers produce generic results that rarely match reality.
sections.approachBody2: We solve this by combining industry data from recognized sources like SCB wage statistics and McKinsey Global Institute with verified customer data from real AI implementations. This gives calculations based on actual time savings — not theoretical estimates from consulting reports.
sections.approachBody3: All our assumptions are also conservative. We always round down, never up. This means the savings we show represent a lower bound — the actual savings are very likely higher.
sections.scbBody: Gross salaries per occupation (SSYK codes 4222, 4119, 3322, 3313). Weighted average: 36,465 SEK/month → loaded cost 54,333 SEK/month → 370 SEK/h. Calculator value: 350 SEK/h (conservative).
sections.mckinseyBody: "The Economic Potential of Generative AI" — automation potential per function. Customer operations: 30–45% cost reduction. All work activities: 60–70% of time (theoretical).
sections.verifiedBody: 56 active automations mapped at Telestore Sverige AB. Transaction volumes pulled directly from Airtable. Time estimates (before/after) from structured interview with the founder. Total verified savings: ~390,000 SEK/year.
sections.formulaBody:
Hours saved = Employees × Hours/week × Automation rate

Savings (SEK/year) = Hours saved × 52 × 350 SEK/h

Year 1 savings = Total × 0.65 (ramp-up factor)

Range: ±15% to reflect variation
conservativeBody: Hourly cost: 350 SEK/h (vs 370 SEK/h calculated — 5% conservative margin)
Overhead not included (office space, IT, equipment)
Error costs not included (Telestore: ~26,400 SEK/year eliminated)
Quality effects not monetized (Trustpilot 3 years running)
The calculator systematically underestimates actual savings
sections.limitationsBody: Single case study (e-commerce, <10 employees). Time estimates based on memory, not systematic measurement. No control group. McKinsey data from 2023 — technology evolves rapidly.
sections.disclaimerBody: The calculator is an estimation tool, not a guarantee. Actual savings depend on process maturity, system landscape and implementation quality.

cta.downloadBody: Get the complete document with formulas, sources and the Telestore case as PDF.
cta.gdpr: We process your data in accordance with GDPR. No newsletters without your consent.
cta.successMessage: Thank you! Your PDF is downloading now.
cta.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

items.text: McKinsey Global Institute (2023). The Economic Potential of Generative AI.
McKinsey & Company (2023). The State of AI in 2023.
Telestore Sverige AB (2026). Airtable data + founder interview, 2026-03-31.

meta.title: Case Studies — AI Automation in Practice | Eteya

meta.title: Telestore — Case Study | Eteya AI
meta.description: How Eteya automated Telestores workflows with 56 automations, saving 390,000 SEK/year.

about.title: About the company
about.achievement: Sweden's most satisfied customers on Trustpilot — 3 years running

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.body: Telestore handled all processes manually — from purchasing and listing to customer service and order management. Excel sheets created errors that cost money. Troubleshooting took 2–3 hours per incident with multiple people involved.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.body: 56 automations implemented step by step: 47 Make flows, 2 AI agents and 7 automated scripts. Every process — from IMEI validation to AI-powered price suggestions — was automated with a focus on quality.

quote.text: We went from chasing Excel errors to focusing on growth. Automation hasn't just saved time — it has eliminated entire categories of problems.
quote.author: Filip Thai
